summary: WinUI-specific ReactiveUI guidance focused on dispatcher queue scheduling and reactive view base types.
recommendedPatterns: Scope view bindings and subscriptions with WhenActivated.
avoidPatterns: Do not assume WPF dispatcher types or initialization patterns.
setupSteps: Use reactive WinUI view base classes.
commonPitfalls: Using the wrong scheduler abstraction for dispatcher queue work.
Applying WPF assumptions directly to WinUI.

sources.title: ReactiveUI WinUI builder extensions
sources.notes: WinUI platform bootstrap and scheduling guidance.

harvest.sourceSummary: Curated from local ReactiveUI repositories, official GitHub documentation, and current SDK/package guidance.
harvest.notes: Prepared for the ReactiveUI MCP Server knowledge catalog.
